content:
About

Kelly Electric LLC is a one-man shop run by Brandon Kelly, master electrician. PA license PA-ME-019472, first issued 2001, renewed 2025. Based in Fox Chase, Philadelphia. Residential and small commercial work.
title: About

content:
Contact

Call or text for a quote. Site visits scheduled around current jobs. Most responsive after 5pm on weekdays.
title: Contact

content:
Services

Panel upgrades, EV chargers, generator hookups, GFCI and outlet work, lighting, rewiring, troubleshooting. Permits pulled where required.
title: Services

content:
Service Area

Bucks, Montgomery, and Delaware counties, plus Northeast Philadelphia. If you're near the line, ask.
title: Service Area

content:
License and Insurance

PA Master Electrician license PA-ME-019472. Liability insurance and workers comp through Ridgemont Business Insurance. Documentation available on request.
title: License and Insurance

content:
Panel Upgrades

100-amp to 200-amp service upgrades. Heavy-up for AC, EV charging, and additions. Permit and inspection included.
title: Panel Upgrades

content:
EV Chargers

Level 2 charger circuits sized to your unit. Clean runs to the garage. Load calculation for utility rebates.
title: EV Chargers

content:
Generator Hookups

Transfer switches and inlet boxes for standby and portable generators. Wired safe, no backfeeding.
title: Generator Hookups

content:
Troubleshooting and Repairs

Tripping breakers, dead outlets, flickering lights. I find the fault and fix it. Flat service call plus parts.
title: Troubleshooting and Repairs

content:
Rates

Standard rate is $95 per hour plus materials. Larger jobs quoted flat-rate after a site visit. Estimates are free.
title: Rates

content:
Electrician in Doylestown

Panel upgrades, EV chargers, and repairs in Doylestown and the rest of Bucks county. Licensed and insured.
title: Electrician in Doylestown

title: Electrician in Norristown

title: Electrician in West Chester

content:

title: Electrician in Fox Chase
